subcodes.first_line: O thou dove of the rose-garden of praise and glorification of the Ancient Beauty, the melodies of that bird of the garden of divine knowledge reach these enkindled ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حمامه گلشن حمد و ستایش جمال قدم نغمات آن طیر حدیقه عرفان بسمع این مشتعلان
subcodes.subjects: @love as fire, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @pain of love; love as veil, @call to action
